results.title: Inside Virat Kohli's 311 games ODI career: Has he ever missed a complete series because of an injury?
results.description: To put this period of absence into perspective, looking back at historical records highlights an incredible validation of his career longevity. From the moment he debuted on the international stage back in 2008, there has been no documented case of Kohli missing a complete bilateral series or a significant tournament for the national team solely because of a physical ailment.

results.title: Indian bond yields edge lower as traders await RBI policy decision
results.description: The 10-year yield fell to 6.9802 percent ahead of the RBI’s rate decision, with investors watching for cues on inflation, rupee support and debt inflows.

results.title: Rupee opens eight paise stronger at 95.71 against dollar ahead of RBI rate decision
results.description: RBI is expected to keep interest rates steady at 5.25 percent

results.title: Two firefighters injured in fire at five-storey office building in Delhi’s Greater Kailash-I
results.description: The incident comes days after a major fire in Malaviya Nagar claimed 21 lives, prompting renewed scrutiny of fire safety measures across commercial establishments in the national capital.

results.title: FIFA's World Cup pre-match ceremony overhaul shows football is becoming as much about spectacle as sport
results.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 will have a new fan-centric pre-match ceremonies which the global body hopes will transform the matchday experience, but it's also an attempt to turn the games into a spectacle.

results.title: Elephant Calf Rescued from Deepor Beel After Getting Separated from Herd
results.description: A female elephant calf was rescued on Thursday from the Deepor Beel wetland on the outskirts of Guwahati after it got separated from its herd. According to reports, a herd of around 20 wild elephants entered the wetland area on Wednesday night in search of food.
